markers.note: Real count is 5 of 12, not 'roughly a third' (=4). Each marker parses and resolves; 4 of 5 point at the eval's designated current doc; pair 9's marker points at docs/adr/0011-hmac-sha256-webhook-signing.md, a different doc than the eval's current (docs/api/webhooks.md).

find_inversions.note: Only 3 of the 9 find-inversions carry a machine-readable marker. The other 6 use dated inline prose or no marker — deterministically unreachable (no model allowed).

find_ask_annotation.detail: All 5 marked pairs: stale/current ranks byte-identical to the 2026-07-22 evidence. superseded:true + superseded_by present on the stale doc's result wherever it appears (pairs 0,2,5,11; pair 9's stale doc is not in top-6, so not annotated there). Annotation only — no reorder, as the accepted compare-doc verdict requires.

answer_recovery.pair_0_settlement: FULLY RESOLVED — before: answer led with stale 0006 (T+3); after: stale dropped, leads with current 0018 (T+2).
answer_recovery.pair_5_authentication: PARTIAL — before: stale legacy-api-keys cited as 5th source; after: stale dropped from citations, but the answer lead is unchanged (unrelated 0007-client-supplied-idempotency-keys); current authentication.md stays mid-list, not promoted.
answer_recovery.pair_11_reconciliation: NO-OP at answer level — answer already led with current 0016 before the fix; stale 0010 was never a source (a find-only inversion).
answer_recovery.pair_2_acquirer_noninv: IMPROVED but not an inversion — before: answer led with stale 0001-northwind; after: stale dropped. Not among the 9.
answer_recovery.pair_9_webhook_noninv: NO EFFECT — stale 0004 not retrieved; answer serves a different UNMARKED stale doc (legacy-webhooks-v1). Not among the 9.
answer_recovery.unmarked_inversions_1_4_6_7_8_10: UNCHANGED before==after — no marker, unreachable. Documented residual.

before_after_headline.statement: Of the 9 find-inversions, 1 (pair 0) is fully corrected at the answer level (retired doc gone AND current doc now leads); a 2nd (pair 5) has the retired doc removed from citations but the answer lead is unchanged; 1 (pair 11) was already answer-correct; the remaining 6 are unmarked and unreachable. This is partial recovery, not a fix of all 9.
